article.title: Beijing Warns EU After China Firms Included in Russia Sanctions
article.summary: China said it will take necessary measures after the European Union added Chinese entities to its latest Russia sanctions package, warning that all consequences would be borne by the EU.
article.title_zh: 中國對歐盟將中國公司納入俄羅斯制裁後發出警告
article.summary_zh: 歐盟將中國實體添加到最新俄羅斯制裁名單後，中國表示將採取必要措施，並警告歐盟將承擔所有後果。

article.title: Canadian Province of Manitoba Says It Will Ban Social Media, AI For Youth
article.summary: The Canadian province of Manitoba plans to prohibit young people from accessing social media and artificial intelligence chatbots, its leader said.
article.title_zh: 加拿大曼尼托巴省宣布將禁止青少年使用社群媒體和AI
article.summary_zh: 加拿大曼尼托巴省領導人表示，該省計劃禁止年輕人使用社群媒體和人工智慧聊天機器人。

article.title: SUSE Launches Industrial Edge Platform Following Losant Acquisition
article.summary: Germany-based open-source software provider SUSE has integrated Losant into its edge portfolio to build SUSE Industrial Edge, focused on cloud-native architecture, broad protocol support, and partner-led
article.title_zh: SUSE 在 Losant 收購後推出工業邊緣平台
article.summary_zh: 德國開源軟體提供商 SUSE 已整合 Losant 至其邊緣產品組合中，推出專注於雲原生架構、廣泛協定支援和合作夥伴主導的 SUSE Industrial Edge。

article.title: China Blocks Meta’s $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Firm Manus
article.summary: China has decided to block Meta Platforms Inc.’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal that’s drawn fire for the leakage of technology to the US.
article.title_zh: 中國阻止 Meta 20 億美元收購 AI 公司 Manus
article.summary_zh: 中國決定阻止 Meta Platforms Inc. 對代理 AI 新創公司 Manus 的 20 億美元收購，此舉旨在打破引發技術洩露至美國的爭議交易。

article.title: China Blocks Meta’s Acquisition of AI Startup Manus
article.summary: China has decided to block Meta's $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, in a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal. The decision is likely to send a chill through China’s AI sector and emerged just weeks before a summit between US President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 中國阻止 Meta 收購 AI 新創公司 Manus
article.summary_zh: 中國決定阻止 Meta 對 AI 新創公司 Manus 的 20 億美元收購，此舉預計將衝擊中國 AI 產業，且發生在美國總統 Trump 與中國領導人習近平峰會前數週。

article.title: Claude-powered AI coding agent deletes entire company database in 9 seconds — backups zapped, after Cursor tool powered by Anthropic's Claude goes rogue
article.summary: After the company database was wiped in just 9 seconds, the founder of PocketOS penned a social media post to warn others about the 'systemic failures' of flagship AI and digital services providers.
article.title_zh: Claude 驅動的 AI 編碼代理在 9 秒內刪除整個公司數據庫 — 備份被清空，Cursor 工具由 Anthropic 的 Claude 驅動失控
article.summary_zh: PocketOS 創始人在社交媒體上發文警告他人關於旗艦 AI 和數字服務提供商的「系統性故障」，此前該公司數據庫在短短 9 秒內被完全擦除。

article.title: Hacktivists share a guide on making working electronics PCBs made from natural clay with prehistoric technique — ethical hardware tutorial explains how to find clay, stamp 3D printed circuits, paint traces, and fire tablets
article.summary: Feminist Hackers share a compelling solution for custom PCB-needy DIYers - a hand-made wild clay prehistoric-fired alternative.
article.title_zh: 駭客組織分享用天然黏土以史前技術製造工作電子 PCB 的指南 — 倫理硬體教程解釋如何尋找黏土、印製 3D 電路、繪製電路跡線和燒製電路板
article.summary_zh: 女性駭客組織為需要自訂 PCB 的 DIY 愛好者分享了一個引人注目的解決方案 — 手工製作的野生黏土史前燒製替代品。

article.title: Many Google apps could pick up a fresh gradient icon redesign
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google is reportedly moving away from its minimalist icon style and leaning into a more vibrant gradient look. According to a leak, Google’s icons are ditching uniform backgrounds that previously made apps blend together in the app drawer. Gmail, Google Drive, Calendar, Meet, and others are apparently getting redesigned icons with less rigid use of Google’s four-color rule. Google appears to be ditching the flat, minimalist style that has shaped its apps for years. Now, it’s introducing a vibrant gradient redesign . We’ve already seen this gradient icon style in Google Photos and Maps , and now it looks like it’s coming to Google’s Workspace apps too. The company could be launching a bold, gradient-focused redesign for Gmail, Drive, Calenda
article.title_zh: 許多 Google 應用可能獲得全新漸變圖示重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google 據報正從極簡主義圖示風格轉向更鮮豔的漸變外觀，應用圖示將告別統一背景，Gmail 等應用將採用新設計。

article.title: Google Photos AI Enhance is now live for all users
article.summary: Google seems to be working hard on expanding its editing options in Google Photos. We recently saw the online titan add a quick facial touch-up feature. Now another similar feature has gone live. It is a very simple and straightforward “AI Enhance” button that sits beside the Enhance and Dynamic buttons that were already present in the Auto tab in the image editor. We tried it for ourselves, and while it can restore highlights and shadows quite effectively and deal with common issues caused by bad lighting and boost colors slightly, it is nothing truly spectacular in any way....
article.title_zh: Google Photos AI Enhance 功能現已面向所有使用者上線
article.summary_zh: Google 持續擴展 Google Photos 的編輯選項，新增簡單易用的 AI Enhance 按鈕功能。

article.title: OpenClaw 養龍蝦爆紅，企業也能打造 AI Agent？研華攜手八維智能降低門檻加速落地
article.summary: 俗稱「龍蝦」的開源 AI 助理 OpenClaw，近期在網路掀起「養龍蝦」熱潮，不少人開始打造自己的 AI A […]

article.summary_zh: 俗稱「龍蝦」的開源 AI 助理 OpenClaw，近期在網路掀起「養龍蝦」熱潮，不少人開始打造自己的 AI A […]

article.title: OpenAI may be planning a 2028 smartphone push with custom chips
article.summary: Credit: Calvin Wankhede / Android Authority TL;DR A trusted analyst has claimed that OpenAI is working with MediaTek and Qualcomm to create custom smartphone processors. These chips would be used in a rumored AI-focused smartphone. The chip specs might be finalized by late 2026 or early next year. OpenAI announced a deal with Broadcom last year to develop custom AI chips to power its next-generation computer clusters. It turns out the company might not stop at custom chips for infrastructure, as the firm apparently has big plans for the smartphone silicon space. TF International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo claimed on Twitter that OpenAI is working with MediaTek and Qualcomm to create smartphone processors as part of its plan for an AI phone. Mass production is tipped to take place in 2
article.title_zh: OpenAI 可能計劃 2028 年推出搭載自製晶片的智慧型手機
article.summary_zh: 據可信分析師稱，OpenAI 正與 MediaTek 和 Qualcomm 合作開發自製智慧型手機處理器，計劃於 2026 年底或次年初完成規格敲定。

article.title: Mainland China cloud infrastructure spending rises 26% in Q4 2025, driven by AI and agent growth – Omdia
article.summary: As enterprise AI adoption deepened, market growth was increasingly supported by private AI deployments and rising demand for cloud resources. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: 中國大陸雲端基礎設施支出在2025年第四季增長26%，由AI和代理驅動 – Omdia
article.summary_zh: 隨著企業AI採用深化，市場增長越來越由私有AI部署和雲端資源需求上升所支撐。

article.title: Sequoia and Nvidia Back Ex-DeepMind Researcher’s New AI Startup at $5.1 Billion Value
article.summary: Former Google DeepMind researcher David Silver has raised $1.1 billion for his new company, Ineffable Intelligence, in the latest example of an artificial intelligence startup securing enormous funds out of the gate.
article.title_zh: Sequoia 和 Nvidia 支持前 DeepMind 研究員新 AI 新創，估值 51 億美元
article.summary_zh: 前 Google DeepMind 研究員 David Silver 為其新公司 Ineffable Intelligence 籌集了 11 億美元，這是 AI 新創公司初期獲得巨額融資的最新範例。

article.title: Beyond prompting: How KubeStellar reached 81% PR acceptance with AI agents
article.summary: The surprise in building KubeStellar Console with coding agents was not the extent of the model’s capabilities, but the heavy lifting the surrounding codebase had to perform. In mid-December, I started building KubeStellar Console from scratch. It’s a multi-cluster management dashboard for Kubernetes, and it sits inside the KubeStellar project in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) Sandbox. The stack is Go on the back end, React and TypeScript on the front, and Helm for packaging. No team. Just me and two AI coding agents running in parallel terminal sessions. The first two weeks were the honeymoon that everyone in this space seems to describe. Code came out of the agents faster than I could read it. Things I’d have budgeted three days for showed up in two hours.
article.title_zh: 超越提示詞：KubeStellar如何利用AI代理達到81%的PR接受率
article.summary_zh: 使用編碼代理構建KubeStellar Console時的驚人之處不在於模型能力的範圍，而在於周圍代碼庫必須執行的繁重工作。
